Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class BridgeCallProfiler

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

An IBridgeTracer that collects per-method and per-service statistics for call counts, errors, and latency percentiles. Optionally delegates to an inner tracer.

public sealed class BridgeCallProfiler : IBridgeTracer
Inheritance
object
BridgeCallProfiler
Implements
IBridgeTracer

Constructors

BridgeCallProfiler(IBridgeTracer?)

Creates a profiler with optional inner tracer delegation.

public BridgeCallProfiler(IBridgeTracer? inner = null)

Parameters

inner IBridgeTracer

Optional inner tracer to delegate to.

Methods

ExportToJson()

Exports all statistics as JSON.

public string ExportToJson()

Returns

string

GetAllServiceStats()

Returns aggregated stats for all services that have recorded calls.

public IReadOnlyList<ServiceProfileStats> GetAllServiceStats()

Returns

IReadOnlyList<ServiceProfileStats>

GetMethodStats(string, string)

Gets statistics for a specific method, or null if no calls have been recorded.

public MethodProfileStats? GetMethodStats(string serviceName, string methodName)

Parameters

serviceName string
methodName string

Returns

MethodProfileStats

GetServiceStats(string)

Gets aggregated statistics for a service (all methods), or null if no calls have been recorded.

public ServiceProfileStats? GetServiceStats(string serviceName)

Parameters

serviceName string

Returns

ServiceProfileStats

GetSlowestCalls(int)

Returns the top N methods by average latency (slowest first).

public IReadOnlyList<MethodProfileStats> GetSlowestCalls(int count)

Parameters

count int

Returns

IReadOnlyList<MethodProfileStats>

OnExportCallEnd(string, string, long, string?)

Called when a JS→C# method invocation completes successfully.

public void OnExportCallEnd(string serviceName, string methodName, long elapsedMs, string? resultType)

Parameters

serviceName string
methodName string
elapsedMs long
resultType string

OnExportCallError(string, string, long, Exception)

Called when a JS→C# method invocation fails.

public void OnExportCallError(string serviceName, string methodName, long elapsedMs, Exception error)

Parameters

serviceName string
methodName string
elapsedMs long
error Exception

OnExportCallStart(string, string, string?)

Called when a JS→C# method invocation starts.

public void OnExportCallStart(string serviceName, string methodName, string? paramsJson)

Parameters

serviceName string
methodName string
paramsJson string

OnImportCallEnd(string, string, long)

Called when a C#→JS method invocation completes.

public void OnImportCallEnd(string serviceName, string methodName, long elapsedMs)

Parameters

serviceName string
methodName string
elapsedMs long

OnImportCallStart(string, string, string?)

Called when a C#→JS method invocation is sent.

public void OnImportCallStart(string serviceName, string methodName, string? paramsJson)

Parameters

serviceName string
methodName string
paramsJson string

Called when a service is exposed.

Parameters

serviceName string
methodCount int
isSourceGenerated bool

Called when a service is removed.

Parameters

serviceName string
